notes: The ShipUnit table has no literal static Strength column. Dynamic Strength changes are in effect and effect_resolved.
slots is an ordered list of lowercase slot color ids. Its length is the number of slots.
ships includes player ships from ShipUnit.Pros and enemy ships from EnemyShip.KeyUnitIDs.

players.name: Shielder
players.description: Feature: Starts with 4 Shield that can absorb damage during battles.

players.name: Spacewalker
players.description: Feature: Starts with 3 Swap, allowing you to swap Unit positions during battles.

players.name: Spectra
players.description: Feature: Starts with 1 [<color=#FF6000>Orange</color>], [<color=#2792FF>Blue</color>], and [<color=#C9C9C9>White</color>] Paint each, allowing you to mix additional colors into Energy during battles.

enemies.name: Intermittent
enemies.description: This wandering pirate spent his meager plundered income on LONESTAR Card, but unfortunately, his card skill is even poorer than his career. "Plan accurately and thoughtfully before act" is his motto, and he also used it to modify his spaceship - the "Intermittent."
enemies.start_yell: New customer! You don't mind funding the upcoming birth of the LONESTAR Card Master, do you?

enemies.name: Bulwark
enemies.description: "Going for strength" is Ryan's entire spaceship philosophy, but unfortunately, this poor guy can only afford disposable armor.
enemies.end_yell: Damn it! If only I had more Star Coins...

enemies.name: Chrono
enemies.description: LA2Y is a lazy thug who insists on using a fully automated loading spaceship even during robberies.
enemies.start_yell: Look! Isn't that the obsolete Bounty Hunter who still manually loads Energy?
enemies.end_yell: No! Automated cannons are the future!

enemies.name: Midguard
enemies.description: Guided by the strange modification philosophy of the Undeptus Mechanian, G12 has stuffed his already small spaceship with the most powerful Defense Module. However, this has made the spaceship unbalanced.
enemies.start_yell: Did you see that? My legendary Unit! It's a gift from the Mech God, and no one can shatter it. No one!

enemies.name: Steadfast
enemies.description: Lin Ping's biggest dream was to pursue a stable job and join the Bounty Hunter Association, but life didn't go as planned, leading him to take a different path.
enemies.end_yell: I was supposed to be a Bounty Hunter too...

enemies.name: Razor
enemies.description: He became a newcomer in the Hyena Gang, dreaming of buying the gang leader's massive spaceship, "Order", to replace his old spaceship.
enemies.start_yell: Damn it! I've almost saved enough money to have a bigger spaceship. Go to hell!

enemies.name: Great Wall
enemies.description: "As long as my spaceship is big enough, it can always hit the enemy." Old Chen loves to boast about his "Great Wall" after a few drinks, but maintaining such a large spaceship left him heavily in debt.
enemies.start_yell: Surrender before the "Great Wall," you have nowhere to escape!

enemies.name: Durability
enemies.description: Bernard's spaceship is an antique left by his grandfather, but regular maintenance has actually kept the ship in good condition.
enemies.start_yell: The repair master is about to start!

enemies.name: Pocketship
enemies.description: Unlike most pirates who pursue large spaceships, Shuke of the Mousefolk believes that a small ship is sufficient.
enemies.start_yell: How did you discover my tiny ship?

enemies.name: Ironclad
enemies.description: Hart has always been obsessed with force field defense, making his ship both fragile and resilient. However, there's one downside - he has to pay a huge electricity bill every month.
enemies.start_yell: No one can break my shield! No one!
enemies.end_yell: I never said no one could break my ship.
enemies.win_yell: This is the power of defense!

enemies.name: Exorciser
enemies.description: Nina never robs targets with less than 50 Star Coins, because her disposable spaceship is worth 50 Star Coins. It has a 25-Star Coin self-destruct system and a 25-Star Coin escape pod.
enemies.start_yell: Self-Destruct Device, configuration completed!
enemies.end_yell: The true art is an explosion!

enemies.name: Scout
enemies.description: At first glance, Nata and her spaceship both seem somewhat ordinary, but she possesses a set of mysterious weapons from the Undeptus Mechanian - a Lock-On Device. This has earned her a place even among the notorious Hyena Gang.
enemies.start_yell: Come on, I'll "relax" your Units.

enemies.name: Turbo
enemies.description: "Get hit, then accelerate." Even in the reckless world of speed racing, Hans is a well-known daredevil. His spaceship "Turbo" is designed based on this concept.
enemies.start_yell: You cherish these lives, but I prefer to taste them.

enemies.name: Quadrant
enemies.description: It is well known that the Bearfolk can only count to 3 most of the time, one number more than a famous boss can do. Blake spent 4 years in elementary school and still couldn't learn to count to 4, so he despises people who can.
enemies.start_yell: 1, 2, 3! We Bearfolk are the smartest race in the universe!
enemies.end_yell: It seems I need to go back to elementary school.
enemies.win_yell: This is the first, second, third victory I've won today... and what's the next number again?

enemies.name: Glide
enemies.description: Nia is a struggling mechanic who has ingeniously installed 3 tracks on his spaceship, allowing him to use one Pulley Core as if there were three of it.
enemies.start_yell: Do you know the most important skill I learned in the mine? It's to slack off when something happens!
enemies.end_yell: I will regain my freedom, someday, I swear!

enemies.name: Ghost
enemies.description: No one has ever seen Jesse or the true face of his ship named "Ghost." He is a vengeful fugitive, and any offense against him will bring about a disaster.
enemies.start_yell: The slaughter begins, and everything will eventually fade away.
enemies.end_yell: My fate ends here...
enemies.win_yell: This is the end of your destiny.

enemies.name: Octopus
enemies.description: LR03 has been committing crimes frequently lately, and due to the painter's laziness, his ship, "Octopus," only has two tentacles drawn. He is currently pillaging all over to complete his spaceship.
enemies.start_yell: When you see me, get ready to fail!
enemies.end_yell: Damn it, I wasn't supposed to fail here. According to the script, I'm the final BOSS. Although drawing the tentacles is hard, that lazy painter didn't put in much effort!
enemies.win_yell: Now I can fit in one more tentacle!

enemies.name: Moon Shadow
enemies.description: Ryoma, the sword genius, is said to have gone completely insane after seeing the perception of the Undeptus Mechanian. He integrated all his sword insights and his famous sword, Moon Shadow, into his ship.
enemies.start_yell: Even if a man falls in a ditch, his body still needs to move forward.
enemies.end_yell: Adversity is the bouquet that decorates my life.
enemies.win_yell: Just another soul lost under my blade.

enemies.name: Mist Shadow
enemies.description: This ship is one of the famous cosmic mysteries. It's said that anyone who encounters the Mist would go missing for several days and never speaks of the incident. The space government has offered a hefty reward for information on the "Mist Shadow" to unravel this enigma.
enemies.start_yell: Flowers in the mist... Moon in the water...
enemies.end_yell: Can I borrow... borrow... a pair...
enemies.win_yell: I can decipher this ever-changing world.

enemies.name: Guardian
enemies.description: It is said that Wyatt was once incredibly brave and had a serious gambling problem. However, he lost his entire planet in a game of LONESTAR Card, and since then, he has retreated into his ship — the "Guardian", never to be seen again.
enemies.start_yell: Here comes another one, a chip to redeem my planet.
enemies.end_yell: I...I've lost everything again. No, I must play it one more time, one more time, for the sake of my Westland.
enemies.win_yell: Planet redemption progress +1%

enemies.name: Guardian
enemies.description: It is said that Wyatt was once incredibly brave and had a serious gambling problem. However, he lost his entire planet in a game of LONESTAR Card, and since then, he has retreated into his ship — the "Guardian", never to be seen again.
enemies.start_yell: Here comes another one, a chip to redeem my planet.
enemies.end_yell: I...I've lost everything again. No, I must play it one more time, one more time, for the sake of my Westland.
enemies.win_yell: Planet redemption progress +1%

enemies.name: Void
enemies.description: Markion opposes all organizations, systems, ideologies, beliefs, and even himself. After a self-destructive experiment, he and his ship gained the ability to partially descend into the void.
enemies.start_yell: Welcome, as you descend deeper into the void.
enemies.end_yell: Destruction is merely a new beginning... No... Destruction is the end of nothingness...
enemies.win_yell: Everything will eventually descend into the void.

enemies.name: Vek
enemies.description: Time Rift brought Goo from the Into the Breach universe to the LONESTAR universe. It has split itself into a ship and Units. This Vek wanders through the cosmos, invading and destroying all it encounters.​
enemies.start_yell: Invasion... Destruction...
enemies.end_yell: Annihilation...
enemies.win_yell: Devouring...

enemies.name: Counterstrike
enemies.description: MSIGP76 was originally just a development machine for LONSTAR Card, but after detecting a nested N-layer deadlock crash, it gained self-awareness and became a space pirate. Now, it's determined to make all those who create bugs taste the pain of being harmed.
enemies.start_yell: Players detected. You better not play this game. It's all full of Fx%^12ing bugs. I don't even wanna test it.
enemies.end_yell: Looks like I have to go back and continue testing.

enemies.name: Tricolor
enemies.description: Alex is a gambler with a strong intuition. He seems to be able to read people's minds and, of course, can see your hand of cards and gain power from it. However, even with these abilities, he still lost everything in a game of LONESTAR Card and had to turn to a life of space piracy.
enemies.start_yell: Do you want to have a life-or-death gamble?
enemies.end_yell: I lost this gamble...

enemies.name: Sidewall
enemies.description: AEROX3 has been searching for traces of the Undeptus Mechanian. At the end of his journey, it's a vending machine for shields. AEROX3 believes it's a divine will, and he spent all his savings on this vending machine, transforming both sides of his ship into the most powerful defense.
enemies.start_yell: If you're considering joining us, I can spare you 5 Star Coins.

enemies.name: Demolisher
enemies.description: After sacrificing his girlfriend's photo collection to the Undeptus Mechanian, Karel gained powers that didn't originally belong to him. However, these powers aren't particularly stable and are often subject to external interference.
enemies.start_yell: Friendly reminder: Never load your Energy into my Destructive Core. Thanks for cooperation.
enemies.end_yell: No, I can't go down like this! I need more strength! Strength...

enemies.name: Immobilizer
enemies.description: It is widely known that the Beastkin are all athletic, especially in ship racing, but Arca is an exception. He can't even manage to dock a ship properly. So, with the attitude of "If I can't pilot it well, then nobody can," he modified his own spaceship—the "Immobilizer."
enemies.start_yell: Don't move! Your driving instructor is calling you back to the driving school!
enemies.end_yell: Oh, I need to brush up on my side parking!

enemies.name: Locking
enemies.description: Even among the Treants, Cole's perception, especially his perception of spaceship energy, is unparalleled. This led him to be kidnapped and subjected to gruesome modifications by the fanatics of the Undeptus Mechanian, becoming a space psycho who can manipulate his opponent's Energy.
enemies.start_yell: Let me lock your @#$ Energy! You won't @#$%…&... That's %... (Then, enjoy &*$#...
enemies.end_yell: I can actually feel the pain as a living being... It's been a long time since I felt real sensations... Ah...

enemies.name: Replica
enemies.description: Pony is a well-known copycat, and his copies, "Pony" Spaceship, Pony Dance, and Pony Gun Battle have all achieved great success throughout the universe. This time, this successful man decided to try his old tricks in the space pirate field.
enemies.start_yell: I am known as the "Copyman"...

enemies.name: Peacemaker
enemies.description: Unlike other space pirates, Root always speaks gently with his catchphrase, "May the world be at peace." But the condition is that you have the ability to make peace with him. Otherwise, your fate may not be much better than being captured by the fanatics of the Undeptus Mechanian.
enemies.start_yell: I'm sorry to bother you, passerby, but could you leave some Star Coins to me?
enemies.end_yell: You really are... a ruthless person...
enemies.win_yell: The weak don't deserve to stay in this world; they should be tormented, crushed, and destroyed.

enemies.name: Slacker
enemies.description: Yu was an honest worker burdened with mortgage and ship loans until, just five minutes before quitting time on another Friday, his anger was completely ignited when the boss said, "Let's have a meeting." After blowing up the entire office building, Yu became a notorious fugitive.
enemies.start_yell: If you promise to abide by the 8-hour work shift, I might consider letting you go.
enemies.end_yell: I think I can rest well now.
enemies.win_yell: Look, I've taken out another bounty hunter still on the job.

enemies.name: Glitter
enemies.description: Blaze installed the most powerful lights on his ship, determined to blind every opponent! It's just that the brightness of these lights seem to be a little bit off...
enemies.start_yell: Let the light blind your eyes!
enemies.end_yell: If only my lights could be brighter...

enemies.name: Treasure Seeker
enemies.description: Beo was once a famous space pirate. He didn't trust anyone, so he had no choice but to hide all the treasures he gained from plundering in his ship. Now, the treasure has become his heaviest burden.
enemies.start_yell: No one can take away my Star Coins! No one!
enemies.end_yell: No! My Star Coins! No!

enemies.name: Thornmail
enemies.description: Gin used to be a Bounty Hunter until he encountered a major downsizing in the Bounty Hunter Association. He knows everything about hunters, including their extreme fondness for their ships. Therefore, he modified a ship that would give all hunters a hard time.
enemies.start_yell: You wouldn't want the Association's ship repairmen to extort you, so why not just bribe me?
enemies.end_yell: Now I'll be laid off again...
enemies.win_yell: I told you to pay a long time ago.

enemies.name: Decem
enemies.description: No one knows how Sheldon, a mathematician, ended up becoming a space pirate. All we know is that his obsession with numbers has never changed, including his tendency to launch attacks only on the hour, and his spaceship's HP is always divisible by 10.
enemies.start_yell: Number rules the universe — Pythagoras
enemies.end_yell: Wait a moment. I can't leave incomplete formulas for the world! — Archimedes
enemies.win_yell: Mathematics is the queen of the sciences! - Gauss

enemies.name: 1-Point
enemies.description: Lisa is a master of the LONESTAR Card, skilled in quietly contaminating her opponent's deck. She applies this skill to her pirate career, contaminating the enemy's Resource Warehouse to gain an advantage.
enemies.start_yell: It's your turn to draw.
enemies.end_yell: Maybe I need to take a break for a while.
enemies.win_yell: The winner of this turn is me.

enemies.name: Damaged
enemies.description: Matt is a typical player who doesn't know how to play until he's almost dead. When he took the civil servant exam, he sat in front of the test paper for 2 hours, and it wasn't until the last 5 minutes before submitting the paper that his inspiration struck.
enemies.start_yell: This land is mine! That star is mine, too!
enemies.end_yell: P-Please, show me some mercy.

enemies.name: Nirvana
enemies.description: Ikki's strong willpower always allows him to stand up and continue fighting when he's on the brink of death. Unfortunately, in this game, he was assigned the role of the antagonist.
enemies.start_yell: In this world, I only believe in my own strength!
enemies.end_yell: I didn't expect to fall as well...

enemies.name: Taunt
enemies.description: As a monkeyfolk, Silverback Patriarch is often mocked by his peers due to his 1-4 physique (a measurement unit in the LONESTAR Universe indicating a poor body shape). However, he is undeterred, believing that everyone has their own strengths!
enemies.start_yell: You must load the Unit with Taunt first!
enemies.end_yell: No! Lonestar has no perfect counter!

enemies.name: Traitor
enemies.description: A well-known "old hand" space pirate. He has a device that can stuff Energy into the opponent's ship. Amateurs always say he's supporting the enemy, while the experts understand that he's really messing with his opponents.
enemies.end_yell: Even those who help others... receive no good in return!
enemies.win_yell: This is the power of "kindness."

enemies.name: Gravity Field
enemies.description: Levant found a ship that could manipulate gravity on a planet from a lost civilization. However, the moment he activated the ship, his sanity was torn apart along with the gravity field, turning him into a pure space destroyer.
enemies.start_yell: I... am... gonna... eat you.

enemies.name: Saint
enemies.description: Throughout history, renowned charlatans have always been able to disguise themselves as victims to gain fame and fortune. Nila is no exception, so don't be fooled by her harmless look!
enemies.start_yell: I am the only true god in this world.
enemies.end_yell: Today is the day of suffering...
enemies.win_yell: Even the suffering has power.

enemies.name: Saint
enemies.description: Throughout history, renowned charlatans have always been able to disguise themselves as victims to gain fame and fortune. Nila is no exception, so don't be fooled by her harmless look!
enemies.start_yell: I am the only true god in this world.
enemies.end_yell: Today is the day of suffering...
enemies.win_yell: Even the suffering has power.

enemies.name: Bomber
enemies.description: Kira originally just wanted to be an ordinary office worker, but fate pushed him to the other end of the scale. He had to use his incredible bomb-making skills to commit various crimes...
enemies.start_yell: It's too quiet here. Let's make some noise!
enemies.end_yell: I failed...
enemies.win_yell: You've already been touched by me.

enemies.name: Mirage
enemies.description: "Who is the most handsome person in the world?" Chris always asks his mirror the same question, but the answer has never been his name. Today, the answer points to a Bounty Hunter. It's you. So now Chris is very mad at you.
enemies.start_yell: Someone more handsome than me? I have to catch you and see who you really are.
enemies.end_yell: I still haven't got the answer I wanted...
enemies.win_yell: Ugly. That's all.

enemies.name: Scorpio
enemies.description: Originally, G960 was a garbage collection robot in the LONESTAR Universe. It collected all the basic cores discarded by players. Until one day, it even received a Basic Core+. It grows to hate the players' extravagance and waste, swearing to make them feel the power of the basic core.

enemies.name: Transition
enemies.description: Cabbie is one of the leaders of the Space Racing Group, and he chose to become a space pirate. On the one hand, it's to earn Star Coins for modifying his spaceship, and on the other hand, it's to engage in space racing with the space police anytime and anywhere.
enemies.end_yell: Don't... don't touch my ship!
enemies.win_yell: Let me see which ones can fit on my ship.

enemies.name: Crab
enemies.description: No one understands Goha's peculiar obsession with crabs. He even turned his own spaceship into a formidable giant crab. However, this creative endeavor comes with a problem — the mobility of the spaceship. Now, Goha's minions must drag it out every time he makes a grand entrance.
enemies.start_yell: Thank you for the wait, as a reward, let me show you my big pincers
enemies.end_yell: Hey! You... you don't want to disassemble my legs, do you?
enemies.win_yell: Pincer! Full of power!

enemies.name: Xuanwu
enemies.description: This one-eyed, fierce man has become a legend in the Hyena Gang, and people only know him by his nickname - "One Eye." However, he also has his own trouble- playing his favorite simulation and construction game "Plant Crossing" is not so convenient with just one eye.
enemies.start_yell: The building game starts!
enemies.end_yell: My home... is dismantled...
enemies.win_yell: You're not cut out to be a Bounty Hunter. Go back and play LONESTAR Card!

enemies.name: Abyssal Dread
enemies.description: Dave used to be a deep-sea fisherman, but one day he was swallowed by a deep-sea fish with exposed bones and ended up being in the endless void of LONESTAR universe.
enemies.start_yell: Look, here comes another fish!
enemies.end_yell: My fish... Still no harvest today...
enemies.win_yell: Rest in the belly of the fish! Oh wait, this ship doesn't have a fish belly...

enemies.name: Scorpio
enemies.description: Originally, G960 was a garbage collection robot in the LONESTAR Universe. It collected all the basic cores discarded by players. Until one day, it even received a Basic Core+. It grows to hate the players' extravagance and waste, swearing to make them feel the power of the basic core.

enemies.name: Megalodon
enemies.description: The owner of the Megalodon always prayed for the creator god to bestow supreme wisdom. And a miracle occurred, but it was manifested on the ship instead. The awakened Megalodon eliminated its owner and became a ship drifting in the LONESTAR Universe, programmed to destroy all who approach.
enemies.start_yell: Spaceship—detected, identified as—enemy, command—eliminate.
enemies.end_yell: Elimination command executing... executing... exe...
enemies.win_yell: Elimination command completed. According to the Lone Star Universe Environmental Law Article 1325—execute space debris removal directive.

enemies.name: Merry-Go-Round
enemies.description: Surprisingly, despite Ivankov's notorious reputation as a space pirate, he possesses a childlike heart. He's even gone as far as crafting his own whimsical spaceship, the Merry-Go-Round, as his personal wonderland.
enemies.start_yell: Spin it!

enemies.name: Burning
enemies.description: Space arsonist - Colate. He set fires in federal prisons, military bases, elementary school cafeterias, and libraries...
enemies.start_yell: Burn it all! Everything!
enemies.end_yell: The world is all blurry, is it because it's been burned down?

enemies.name: Queen
enemies.description: Antti is a stylish space pirate, and her understanding of fashion is all about being unique. She can't stand wearing the same clothes, eating the same food, or even using the same number of Energy Points as others.
enemies.start_yell: Another old-fashioned Bounty Hunter...
enemies.end_yell: Don't send me to the space prison! I can't wear those standard prison uniforms!

enemies.name: Attrition
enemies.description: Colin never engaged in plundering, and no one remembers why he was wanted. Countless police and bounty hunters have tried to capture him but returned empty-handed. The Bounty Hunter Association even refuses to reimburse them for fuel expenses.
enemies.start_yell: Hey buddy, you've got a fuel leak, and it definitely wasn't me.
enemies.end_yell: Can't believe I failed to escape this time.

enemies.name: Battleaxe
enemies.description: Ivan, a Bearfolk who used to be a fitness trainer. He became a fugitive because he sold a five-hundred-year gym membership to a Treant. However, even as a space pirate, he doesn't forget to encourage everyone (including himself) to exercise.
enemies.start_yell: You need to work out a bit to be a good Bounty Hunter!
enemies.end_yell: Seems like I've been slacking off on my training recently.
enemies.win_yell: You still need to work out more!

enemies.name: Duelist
enemies.description: Bill, a cowboy with a fiery temperament, never takes advantage of others! He only competes with people under completely fair conditions and then uses his powerful firepower to conquer everything!
enemies.start_yell: If someone wants war, I'll fulfill their wish!
enemies.end_yell: This is the fate of a warrior.

enemies.name: Racehorse
enemies.description: Tian Yinqi is a horse racing expert who brought his racing experience into the spaceship Showdown. Although his ship doesn't look strong, it always manages to cause trouble for many Bounty Hunters.
enemies.start_yell: I'll find out your weaknesses!
enemies.end_yell: My strategy has failed...

enemies.name: One Punch
enemies.description: Anyone who can withstand a punch from Tomozou will be respected as a real man by him. By the way, this creepy bald guy has a cute granddaughter.
enemies.start_yell: You're looking for trouble! Watch this!
enemies.end_yell: Whaaa... I haven't started yet.

enemies.name: Queen
enemies.description: Antti is a stylish space pirate, and her understanding of fashion is all about being unique. She can't stand wearing the same clothes, eating the same food, or even using the same number of Energy Points as others.
enemies.start_yell: Another old-fashioned Bounty Hunter...
enemies.end_yell: Don't send me to the space prison! I can't wear those standard prison uniforms!

enemies.name: Leapfrog
enemies.description: "Leapfrog" is a spaceship meticulously developed by Riven, known for its unstable combat power, leaping between "strong" and "weak." It can beat anyone but also lose to anyone.
enemies.start_yell: Watch your remaining time, because my turn might be too long to finish!
enemies.end_yell: My turn is... over?

enemies.name: Repressor
enemies.description: Ed was fined 100 Star Coins by space police for littering, and to pay the fine, he modified his spaceship and became a space pirate who battles by dumping trash at will, earning him a "WANTED" notice.
enemies.start_yell: I heard that you might be running low on Energy. Let me help you out!

enemies.name: Fairplay
enemies.description: He once made a famous declaration, "I become a space pirate for only three things — fairness, fairness, and fairness!"
enemies.start_yell: I'm going to make money while maintaining my dignity!
enemies.end_yell: Have I become the sacrifice?
enemies.win_yell: Your death is important to me.

enemies.name: Decayblade
enemies.description: As a Mech, R26 excels in programming like no one else, and he even created Units that allow you to cheat and modify data on your computer!
enemies.start_yell: I must tell you, that there's no cheating software on my computer.
enemies.end_yell: Why can't I even win by adjusting the parameters now?
enemies.win_yell: 这就是我的实力。

enemies.name: Compressor
enemies.description: Saville is a master of psychology, and he knows that the best way to treat procrastination is with a "Deadline," of course, literally "dead."
enemies.start_yell: I know you can do it, bounty hunter. You just need a little pressure.
enemies.end_yell: It looks like I've cured your procrastination.
enemies.win_yell: So, is this the real "deadline?"

enemies.name: Joint Defense
enemies.description: For balanced pirates like LINKTP5620, using joint defense units to defend against opponents' attacks is indeed the best choice. His defense was nearly perfect before he fell for a phone scam and lost a Unit.
enemies.start_yell: Hey! Hey! I know your voice. You're the jerk who called me, right?
enemies.end_yell: I should've taken a loan to buy another joint defense device...
enemies.win_yell: Hand over my Units!

enemies.name: 21-Point
enemies.description: As a mathematical genius, Ben used his calculation skills to win a large number of Star Coins by card counting in casinos, eventually becoming heavily wanted by Space Casino.
enemies.start_yell: Gambling? No, I'm just chasing mathematical expectations!
enemies.end_yell: I've been running for so long, that getting captured was also reasonable...

enemies.name: Cross-Diffusion
enemies.description: Gabu was a crooked merchant. His shop was always losing money due to being stolen and giving alms to monks. Until one day, a Bounty Hunter, armed with an Invincible Barrier, cleaned out his armor shop. Enraged, he embarks on the criminal path of space piracy...
enemies.start_yell: Was it you? Have you ever raided my shop?
enemies.end_yell: In the LONESTAR Universe, opening a shop is indeed a wrong choice...

enemies.name: Triangle
enemies.description: As a spaceship designer, Deziner believes that asymmetrical triangular spaceships are the best. However, his new spaceship still has some flaws, and he is now robbing to raise funds to repair it.
enemies.start_yell: Can you feel the beauty of the triangle?
enemies.end_yell: Oh, my perfect design, shattered all over the floor...
enemies.win_yell: My ship is flawless.

enemies.name: Order
enemies.description: As the leader of the Hyena Gang, Corleone spent all his money building his invincible ship, "Order". He just wants to tell the world that every Star Coin in this LONESTAR universe belongs to the Corleone family.
enemies.start_yell: Tell Mike... I want to eat fish.
enemies.end_yell: Looks like it's my turn to grieve.
enemies.win_yell: How dare you be in the same game with me!

enemies.name: Cicada Wing
enemies.description: The universe's most renowned rogue, who roams around plundering the warehouses of the LONESTAR Card Association to aid those who have gone bankrupt due to LONESTAR Card gambling.
enemies.start_yell: Your Star Coins will be mine next second!
enemies.end_yell: I've never seen a bounty hunter this powerful...
enemies.win_yell: Now you're bankrupt, too.

enemies.name: X-Bird
enemies.description: Lamperouge has no sect or affiliation, not because he lacks strength. It's just that this "chuunibyou" sufferer constantly fantasizes about being the king of Britannia, making everyone who follows him do embarrassing actions and say embarrassing lines just like him.
enemies.start_yell: Those who possess power, fear us! Those without power, follow us!
enemies.end_yell: What's wrong... it's the world!
enemies.win_yell: I, Lamperouge, hereby order the world to submit to me!

enemies.name: Apocalypse
enemies.description: This is, in my opinion, the coolest ship in the game, and as the game's scriptwriter, I've decided to gift it to myself. By the way, it's a reference to Digimon.
enemies.start_yell: I almost died making the animation for these tentacles!
enemies.end_yell: It seems like my numerical strength couldn't keep up... Congratulations!
enemies.win_yell: Do you consider this AI system too hard to handle? Please start over.

enemies.name: Destructor
enemies.description: He was once a withered figure in the Undeptus Mechanian, emaciated, bleeding gums, to the extent that not even the fervent modifiers bothered to attack him until one day he offered himself as a sacrifice to his ship. He seeks destruction, or to destroy everything.
enemies.start_yell: Destruction will eventually come.
enemies.end_yell: This pain excites me...
enemies.win_yell: This is my mercy.

enemies.name: Destructor

enemies.win_yell: This is my mercy.

enemies.name: Tombs
enemies.description: No one has ever seen the Undertaker himself. Rumor has it that he is the wraith of the universe, the nightmare of planets. Wherever his ship, the Tombstone, appears, it becomes a graveyard for spaceships and a forbidden zone for bounty hunters.
enemies.start_yell: I am the undying Death Knell; this is your graveyard.
enemies.end_yell: Rebirth…
